schema_purpose: Single source-of-truth для bootstrap всех новых Claude Code sessions после mv операции. Каждая новая session читает свою секцию из roles.<role>-v<N> в первом turn'е.

mv_operation.rationale: NEW-1 mitigation: ASCII path forever для MCP Agent Mail project_key compatibility. Устраняет risk unicode equality comparison failures в SQLite FTS.
prerequisites: ВСЕ Claude Code sessions текущего проекта ЗАКРЫТЫ (иначе working directory locked)
Target free: Test-Path C:\work должен вернуть False
mv_operation.post_mv_first_action: Открыть 3 новых Claude Code sessions в C:\work\realty-portal\ (или 2 критичных — school-v2 + librarian-v3)

mcp_project_key_before_mv_was: C:\work\realty-portal\docs\school (NOT USED after mv — hash equality risk)

school-v2.predecessor: school-v1 (prepared handoff, consensus closed before close)
read_on_start_order: docs/school/warmstart/school_v2_brief.md (НОВОЕ 23:55: 2-минутное TL;DR — читай первым, написано librarian-v2 под force-majeure когда school-v1 зависла перед самозаписью)
docs/school/handoff/school_v2.md (полный state, обновлён school-v1 в 23:39 до её зависания)
school-v2.first_turn_action: school_global_scan + validate consensus closure (22:45-23:20) + ACK состояния Илье + инициировать POC после Ilya 'старт' команды к librarian-v3
school-v2.initial_priority_P0: Дождаться от Ильи 'старт POC' → forward команду librarian-v3 через dispatch_queue
canon_obligations_after_launch: school_global_scan перед каждым turn'ом к Илье
communication_delivery_closure (📬 блок в каждом ответе Илье)

librarian-v3.predecessor: librarian-v2 (closed after 23:40 manifest write, all artifacts transferred)
first_turn_action_checklist: 4. sed-replace: grep -rl 'Новая папка' docs/ realty-portal/ | xargs sed -i 's|C:\\Users\\97152\\Новая папка|C:\\work|g' (28 files, 5-10 min)
8. Write ACK block в inbox_from_librarian.md: 'librarian-v3 started, canon 0.3 read, path migration complete, waiting Ilya старт POC'
9. Stay in waiting mode до Ilya explicit 'старт POC'
initial_priority_P0_after_start_command: MCP Agent Mail Phase 1 POC — 12 шагов SSH tunnel mode, ~65 мин
Step 0: Claude Code MCP client compatibility smoke test (NEW-9)
Step 0a: project_key unicode sanity test (NEW-1, теперь с ASCII path should pass trivially)
Step 1-11: полный POC install (uv, Python 3.14, FastMCP localhost, systemd, bearer, SSH tunnel client config)
priority_P1_after_POC_green: migrate last 10 inbox-блоков в MCP threads
canon_obligations_after_launch: context_measurement_rule (НЕ self-estimate, только Ilya UI indicator)

parser-rumah123-v3.business_unit: BU2 Content Factory (rumah123 scraper + LiteLLM gateway owner temporarily for IU3)
parser-rumah123-v3.defer_reason: parser может подождать handoff_v3 пока school-v2 + librarian-v3 делают MCP POC. Phase 2 rollout включает parser регистрацию в MCP.
first_turn_action_if_launched: Прочитать handoff_v3 + outbox (A1 heartbeat redesign + A2 LiteLLM fallback + A3 Sonnet/Kimi setup)
Path migration: NO — parser работает на Aeza в /opt/realty-portal/, не в Windows path. Но handoff references могут иметь Windows path — sed-replace если есть
Stay в waiting для либо: (a) ACK свежего outbox school, (b) старт A1 heartbeat redesign после librarian heartbeat-common.md
priority_after_mcp_POC: Register parser-rumah123-v3 identity в MCP Agent Mail (Phase 2 rollout)
A3 LiteLLM endpoint deploy (Sonnet 4.5 + Kimi K2 + fallbacks) → opens IU3 multi-model gateway для all ролей
A1 heartbeat-parser.md draft (триггер для heartbeat-common.md у librarian)

path_migration_sed_commands.purpose: После mv librarian-v3 обновляет все references старого path на новый. Выполняется в Step 4 first-turn checklist.
path_migration_sed_commands.powershell_command: Get-ChildItem -Path C:\work -Recurse -Include *.md,*.json,*.yaml,*.py,*.ps1,*.mjs -File | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-Content $_ -Raw -Encoding UTF8; if ($c -match 'Новая папка') { $n = $c -replace 'C:\\Users\\97152\\Новая папка', 'C:\work' -replace 'C:/work', 'C:/work'; Set-Content -Path $_ -Value $n -Encoding UTF8 -NoNewline } }
path_migration_sed_commands.bash_command_git_or_wsl: grep -rlZ 'Новая папка' . | xargs -0 sed -i 's|C:\\Users\\97152\\Новая папка|C:\\work|g; s|C:/work|C:/work|g'
known_files_with_hardcoded_paths: ~/.claude/projects/<old-hash>/ (Claude Code session storage — может быть pre-broken, v3 checks)

mcp_poc_readiness.architecture: localhost:8765 + SSH tunnel + bearer token (per consensus 22:15 Ilya + workshop closure 23:20)
mcp_poc_readiness.triggered_by: Ilya explicit 'старт POC' command to librarian-v3 after mv + first-turn checklist done
mcp_poc_readiness.step_0_compat_check: NEW-9 Claude Code MCP client compatibility pre-test (15 min throw-away echo endpoint)
mcp_poc_readiness.step_0a_unicode_check: NEW-1 project_key sanity — теперь с ASCII path should pass trivially
mcp_poc_readiness.acceptance: T1-T10 test suite (mailbox reliability invariants I-1..I-10)

canon_v04_scope_final.bump_trigger: MCP POC T1-T10 green (all tests pass)

operator_model_consensus_workshop_protoc.applies_to: всех active experts + school orchestrator + Ilya facilitator
operator_model_consensus_workshop_protoc.current_workshop_state: closed at step 7 (consensus declared 23:20), step 8 partially complete (Ilya approved architecture + SSH tunnel; awaits NEW-1 a/b decision + 'старт POC')
anti_patterns_school_catches: School declares consensus without expert response to counter → premature closure
Expert repeats position ignoring counter → loop without progress
Ilya imposes decision mid-cycle → breaks expert autonomy (facilitator, not dictator)
Consensus closed but canon not bumped → drift
Consensus reached but NEW concerns at implementation → school re-opens (exactly what happened with NEW-9)

what_breaks_if_this_manifest_is_ignored: Новые sessions не узнают про NEW-1 ASCII path (POC falls при project_key comparison в SQLite)
Роли не читают handoff_v3 → холодный старт = ~30 мин потерь onboarding
School не инициирует POC автоматически → ждёт Ильи вручную forwarded команды
parser-v3 пропускает handoff updates → работает по устаревшему canon
pointer_to_this_manifest_for_role_launch: При старте новой session — первая instruction агенту: 'Прочти docs/school/launch_manifest.json секцию roles.<your-role>-v<N>. Следуй read_on_start_order, потом first_turn_action.'
